title: Workflow import fails due to existing ID collision
symptom: After deleting a workflow and attempting to import a backup, n8n throws 'Can't connect to n8n'. The workflow cannot be accessed or imported correctly.
applies_when: Attempting to import a backup of the workflow
not_this_if: The workflow is still accessible in the workspace
root_cause: The database retains the ID of the deleted workflow, causing a conflict when trying to import a new workflow with the same ID. This results in n8n being unable to process the import correctly.
fix_steps: Open the exported JSON file in a text editor
Locate the line with the 'id' field and delete that line
Import the modified JSON file back into n8n
agent_instruction: Remove the 'id' field from the exported JSON file before importing it back into n8n.
